app.title: Forms
app.tagline: Build your own forms and collect responses.

list.emptyHint: Tip: type a title above and hit Enter.

fields.title: Fields
fields.empty: No fields yet. Pick a type below.

visibility.title: Visibility & Sharing
visibility.publishHint: Set the status to "Published" to share.

recurrence.title: Recurrence — group responses into waves
recurrence.hint: Incoming responses are auto-tagged with a wave label (e.g. "W19 / 2026") for trend comparison.
recurrence.waveDue: Next wave is due — send the link to your recipients.
recurrence.needsUnlisted: Set visibility to "unlisted" to create the link.
recurrence.needsRecipients: Add recipient emails in the settings.
recurrence.confirmSend: Send wave to {n} recipients? Your mail client opens with the BCC list and link prefilled. We'll stamp the timestamp after.
recurrence.confirmBulk: Send wave to {n} recipients via Mana Mail? Replies land directly in your forms inbox.

autoSync.title: Auto-sync — create on submit
autoSync.contactsHint: For each form field, pick which contact field it should fill. Leave empty to ignore.
autoSync.eventsHint: For each form field, pick which guest field it should fill. RSVPs are set to "attending".
autoSync.eventNeeded: Pick the event the RSVPs should be created for.
autoSync.needFields: Add at least one answer field to configure mapping.

responses.title: Responses — {form}
responses.emptyHint: Publish the form and share the link to start collecting responses.

branching.title: Logic (If → Then)
branching.empty: No rules. Click "+ Rule" to add a condition.
branching.emptyNeedFields: Add at least two answer fields to build logic.
